items.caption: A 3d illustration of a humanoid figure with a yellow body and a white head, standing against a white background. the figure is holding a circular badge with the text "privacy policy" prominently displayed in black letters. the badge is white with a black border and is attached to the figure's body. the figure appears to be facing the viewer, and the badge is positioned in the center of the image. the overall style of the image is simple and clean, with a focus on the concept of privacy policy.
